scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:whatsapp"
scripts.dev:whatsapp: concurrently "cd whatsapp-service && npm run dev" "cd whatsapp-service && npm run tunnel"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../whatsapp-service && npm install
